testcase.name: Inventory Feature › Should validate all product prices are non-zero

property.name: Story
property.value: Validate product prices and cart checkout flow on SauceDemo

property.name: Test
property.value: Validating the prices of all products

testcase.system-out: Product: Sauce Labs Backpack, Price: $29.99 Product: Sauce Labs Bike Light, Price: $9.99 Product: Sauce Labs Bolt T-Shirt, Price: $15.99 Product: Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket, Price: $49.99 Product: Sauce Labs Onesie, Price: $7.99 Product: Test.allTheThings() T-Shirt (Red), Price: $15.99 >> Price array: 29.99,9.99,15.99,49.99,7.99,15.99 All product prices are non-zero

property.value: Validate product prices and cart checkout flow on SauceDemo
